result.title: NVIDIA Alpamayo In-Car Reasoning: AI That Drives, Explains Decisions, and Responds to Passengers
result.description:
This video showcases four capabilities of NVIDIA Alpamayo, the reasoning vision language action model:

- Chain-of-Thought: Alpamayo continuously reasons through its observations, conclusions, and decisions, improving driving while making its decision process more transparent.
- Verbalized Reasoning: In complex situations, the car selectively explains its reasoning aloud, giving passengers insight into the AI’s decisions and helping to build trust.
- Natural Language Q&A: Riders can ask questions about the car’s behavior or the surrounding environment, and Alpamayo responds in real time.
- Language Instructions and Commands: Passengers can request actions such as changing lanes, speeding up, taking a detour, or pulling over, and Alpamayo performs them naturally.

Together, these capabilities create a safe, transparent, and interactive driving experience.

Learn More: https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/solutions/autonomous-vehicles/alpamayo/

#AutonomousVehicles #PhysicalAI #NVIDIADRIVE

result.title: Official Keynote Closing Video | GTC 2026
result.description:
Gather around the campfire with Jensen and a cast of robots from the GTC keynote as they sing their way through this year’s biggest announcements. From breakthrough AI to accelerated computing, it’s a lighthearted recap of the innovations shaping the future.

result.title: 2026 Americas NVIDIA Partner Network Awards | GTC 2026
result.description:
NVIDIA is honoring the 2026 Americas NVIDIA Partner Network (NPN) award winners, who are leading the next wave of AI innovation, execution and industry impact across the region. These partners are helping customers move from pilots to production with NVIDIA’s full-stack platform — spanning accelerated computing, networking and NVIDIA AI Enterprise software.

This year’s Americas honorees include rising stars, AI excellence and advanced technology partners, as well as leaders in networking, consulting and global systems integrators. They’re modernizing infrastructure, streamlining operations and unlocking new products and services for customers across the Americas.

Learn more: https://blogs.nvidia.com/blog/gtc-2026-news/#npn-partner-awards

result.title: NVIDIA Foundational Technology Montage I GTC 2026 Edition
result.description:
Twenty years after building CUDA, NVIDIA has reinvented computing with a full stack of over a thousand CUDA-X libraries empowering breakthroughs across every field of science and engineering.

These libraries form the algorithmic foundation of physical AI, spanning simulation, robotics, autonomous systems, and beyond.

Learn more: https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/technologies/cuda-x/

result.title: OpenClaw: The ChatGPT Moment for Long-Running, Autonomous Agents
result.description:
A silent revolution in AI is rewriting the rules of computation. Autonomous, self-evolving ""claws"" like OpenClaw are now being adopted at an unprecedented pace, demonstrating their ability to execute complex, long-running goals indefinitely. These agents write code, manage entire workflows, and access local files, ushering in the new application layer for AI. But with unprecedented self-evolving capability, guardrails are essential to give users control over how agents behave and handle data. Watch to understand this explosive shift and the infrastructure emerging to govern long-running agents more safely.

Learn more about how to run autonomous agents safely: https://www.nvidia.com/nemoclaw

#OpenClaw #NVIDIAGTC #AgenticAI
